member.summary: Optional caption text.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IChildMarkdownBlockContainer
member.summary: Marks a block as a container of nested child blocks. Implement this on custom block types so traversal, source-span binding, syntax-tree generation, rewriters, and descendant queries can walk into nested markdown content.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IChildMarkdownBlockContainer.ChildBlocks
member.summary: Nested markdown child blocks owned by the container.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IContextualHtmlMarkdownBlock
member.summary: Allows a block to render HTML with access to the surrounding body render context. Custom blocks can implement this when their HTML output depends on or the surrounding block list rather than only the block's own local state.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IContextualHtmlMarkdownBlock.RenderHtml(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownBodyRenderContext)
member.summary: Renders the block to HTML using the supplied body render context.
member.returns: Rendered HTML for the block.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IContextualHtmlMarkdownInline
member.summary: Allows an inline node to render HTML with access to the active . Implement this on custom inline nodes when HTML output depends on rendering policies such as title, URL/image policy, theme, or other option-driven behavior rather than only local state.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IContextualHtmlMarkdownInline.RenderHtml(OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions)
member.summary: Renders the inline node to HTML using the supplied rendering options.
member.returns: Rendered HTML for the inline.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IInlineContainerMarkdownInline
member.summary: Marks an inline node as a container of nested inline content. Implement this on custom container nodes so source-span binding, syntax tree generation, and object-tree traversal can descend into the nested inline sequence.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IInlineContainerMarkdownInline.NestedInlines
member.summary: Nested inline content owned by the container node.

member.summary: Renders a simple HTML representation of the block.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IPlainTextMarkdownInline

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IPlainTextMarkdownInline.AppendPlainText(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Appends the plain-text representation of the inline node to the supplied string builder.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IRenderableMarkdownInline
member.summary: Rendering contract for inline nodes that can serialize themselves back to Markdown and HTML. Custom inline parser extensions should implement this so the reader, writer, and syntax tree can preserve the node without falling back to opaque object output.

member.summary: Renders the inline node back to Markdown.

member.summary: Renders the inline node to HTML.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.ISyntaxMarkdownBlock
member.summary: Allows a block node to control the syntax-tree node emitted by . Custom block parser and fenced-block extensions can implement this to contribute precise AST nodes instead of falling back to generic output.

member.summary: Builds the syntax-tree node for this block.
member.param: Source span mapped to the block when available.
member.returns: A syntax node representing this block.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.ISyntaxMarkdownBlockWithContext
member.summary: Extended block syntax contract that provides helper APIs for building child syntax nodes. Prefer this over for custom block extensions that need to compose nested block or inline syntax using the same rules as the core reader.

Source span mapped to the block when available.
member.returns: A syntax node representing this block.

member.summary: Allows a custom inline node to control the syntax-tree node shape emitted by .

member.summary: How to deliver CSS. Default: .

member.summary: Connectivity mode for external assets (CDNs). Default: .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.CssHref
member.summary: Optional explicit CSS URL for .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.AdditionalCssHrefs
member.summary: Additional CSS URLs to include (link or inline depending on ).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.AdditionalJsHrefs
member.summary: Additional JS URLs to include (script src or inline depending on ).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.Title
member.summary: Page title for full document rendering. Default: "Document".

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BodyClass
member.summary: Wrap content in <article> with this CSS class. Set to null to avoid wrapper. Default: "markdown-body".

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.IncludeAnchorLinks
member.summary: Include per-heading anchor links (e.g. '#') in HTML rendering. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ShowAnchorIcons
member.summary: When true, show a small anchor icon next to headings (on hover by default).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.AnchorIcon
member.summary: Glyph or text for the anchor icon (e.g., "🔗", "¶"). Default: "🔗".

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.CopyHeadingLinkOnClick
member.summary: When true, clicking the anchor icon copies a deep link to the clipboard.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BackToTopLinks
member.summary: Render small "Back to top" links for headings at or below the given level. 1=H1, 2=H2, etc. Set to false to disable.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BackToTopMinLevel
member.summary: Heading level threshold for BackToTopLinks. Default: 2 (H2+).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BackToTopText
member.summary: Text for the back-to-top link.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ThemeToggle
member.summary: When true, writes a small theme toggle control if supports it. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.EmitMode
member.summary: Emit tags vs manifest-only. Default: .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.Prism
member.summary: Optional Prism highlighting configuration.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.CodeBlockHtmlRenderer
member.summary: Optional callback that can replace HTML emitted for individual code blocks. Returning falls back to the default <pre><code> rendering.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.SemanticFencedBlockHtmlRenderer
member.summary: Optional callback that can replace HTML emitted for semantic fenced blocks. Returning falls back to standard fenced-code presentation.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.TocHtmlRenderer
member.summary: Optional callback that can replace HTML emitted for realized TOC placeholders. Returning falls back to the built-in enhanced TOC rendering.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.FootnoteSectionHtmlRenderer
member.summary: Optional callback that can replace HTML emitted for the aggregated footnote section. Returning falls back to the built-in section/ordered-list rendering.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.GitHubTaskListHtml
member.summary: When true, task lists render using GitHub/cmark-gfm style HTML without OfficeIMO task-list CSS classes. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.GitHubFootnoteHtml
member.summary: When true, footnote references and sections render using GitHub/cmark-gfm style ids, data attributes, numbering by reference order, and omission of undefined/unused footnotes. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BlockRenderExtensions
member.summary: Optional block render extensions that can override HTML emitted for specific block types. Later registrations win when block types overlap.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.CssScopeSelector
member.summary: Prefix selectors in emitted CSS with this scope selector to avoid collisions. Default: "article.markdown-body".

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.RawHtmlHandling
member.summary: Controls how raw HTML blocks are emitted. Default: . For untrusted chat scenarios, prefer or .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ExternalLinksTargetBlank
member.summary: When true, external HTTP(S) links are rendered with target="_blank". Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ExternalLinksRel
member.summary: Optional rel attribute value to apply to external HTTP(S) links. Common safe value: noopener noreferrer. Default: empty (no rel attribute added).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ExternalLinksReferrerPolicy
member.summary: Optional referrerpolicy value to apply to external HTTP(S) links. Common privacy value: no-referrer. Default: empty (no referrerpolicy attribute added).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BaseUri
member.summary: Optional base URI used for origin-based restrictions during HTML rendering. When set and / are enabled, absolute HTTP(S) links/images that are cross-origin are suppressed. Default: null.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.RestrictHttpLinksToBaseOrigin
member.summary: When true and is an absolute HTTP(S) URI, suppresses cross-origin absolute HTTP(S) links. Relative links and non-HTTP schemes (e.g., mailto) are not affected. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.RestrictHttpImagesToBaseOrigin
member.summary: When true and is an absolute HTTP(S) URI, suppresses cross-origin absolute HTTP(S) images. Relative image URLs are not affected. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.BlockExternalHttpImages
member.summary: When true, suppresses absolute external HTTP(S) images regardless of . Useful for privacy-sensitive/untrusted content. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ImagesLoadingLazy
member.summary: When true, emits loading="lazy" on rendered tags. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ImagesDecodingAsync
member.summary: When true, emits decoding="async" on rendered tags. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.ImagesReferrerPolicy
member.summary: Optional referrerpolicy value to apply to rendered tags. Common privacy value: no-referrer. Default: empty (no referrerpolicy attribute added).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.AllowedHttpLinkHosts
member.summary: Optional allowlist of host patterns for absolute HTTP(S) links during HTML rendering. When non-empty, absolute HTTP(S) links are suppressed unless their host matches an entry. Supported patterns: - example.com: exact host match - .example.com: example.com and any subdomain - *.example.com: any subdomain only (not the apex) Default: empty (allow all hosts).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.HtmlOptions.AllowedHttpImageHosts
member.summary: Optional allowlist of host patterns for absolute HTTP(S) images during HTML rendering. When non-empty, absolute HTTP(S) images are suppressed unless their host matches an entry. Pattern rules match . Default: empty (allow all hosts).

member.summary: When true, hides the sidebar TOC completely on narrow screens (width up to 1000px).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.TocOptions.RequireTopLevel
member.summary: When true, ensure the top-level (H1) is included even if a deeper MinLevel was specified. Helps avoid unreadable TOCs that start at H2/H3 without their parent context.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.TocOptions.NormalizeToMinLevel
member.summary: When true (default), the visual indentation of TOC items is normalized so that the minimum included heading level aligns as the root. When false, indentation reflects absolute heading levels (H1 root).

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader
member.summary: Block parsing helpers for .

Parses Markdown text into OfficeIMO.Markdown's typed object model (, blocks, and inlines).
Scope: profile-driven and extension-aware. The core reader can be shaped into OfficeIMO, CommonMark-style, GitHub Flavored Markdown-style, or portable behavior via , including explicit block parser extension registrations.
AST-level inline normalization helpers for model/chat oriented markdown quirks.
Inline parsing helpers for .

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.LooksLikeTableRow(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a line is likely to be part of a markdown table. The logic follows CommonMark's relaxed table rules: when both outer pipes are present a single column is permitted, otherwise at least two pipe-separated cells are required so that plain paragraphs containing a single | are not mis-classified as tables.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.Parse(System.String,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Parses Markdown text into a with typed blocks and basic inlines.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.ParseWithSyntaxTree(System.String,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Parses Markdown text into both the object model and a lightweight syntax tree with source spans.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.ParseWithSyntaxTreeAndDiagnostics(System.String,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Parses Markdown text into the object model, original syntax tree, and document-transform diagnostics.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.ParseFile(System.String,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Parses a Markdown file path into a .

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.ParseInlineText(System.String,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Parses a single line of Markdown inline content into a typed . This helper is exposed to allow other components (e.g., Word converter) to interpret inline markup in contexts like table cells where we currently store raw strings.
member.returns: Parsed sequence of inline nodes.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.IndentedCodeParser
member.summary: Parses indented code blocks (4-space indented). This is a pragmatic subset intended to improve compatibility with common Markdown sources; output is represented as a fenced .

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.ReferenceLinkDefParser
member.summary: Parses reference-style link definitions: [label]: url "title". Definitions are stored in state and the lines are consumed (not added to the doc).

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.SetextHeadingParser
member.summary: Parses Setext headings: Title ===== (level 1) Title ----- (level 2) Requires at least 3 underline characters and no other content on the underline line.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReader.TocParser
member.summary: Recognizes common inline TOC placeholders and converts them into a TocPlaceholderBlock so downstream rendering can generate a proper Table of Contents. Supported forms: [TOC] [[TOC]] [TOC min=2 max=3 ordered=true layout=sidebar-right sticky=true scrollspy=true title="On this page"] {:toc} or

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions
member.summary: Helper methods for registering OfficeIMO.Markdown's built-in block syntax extensions onto a reader profile.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.CalloutsExtensionName
member.summary: Stable registration name for Docs-style callouts.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.TocPlaceholdersExtensionName
member.summary: Stable registration name for TOC placeholder blocks.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.FootnotesExtensionName
member.summary: Stable registration name for footnote definition blocks.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.RegisterOfficeIMODefaults(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Registers the OfficeIMO default built-in block extensions: callouts, TOC placeholders, and footnotes.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.AddCallouts(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Adds Docs-style callout parsing to the supplied reader options.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.AddTocPlaceholders(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Adds TOC placeholder parsing to the supplied reader options.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.AddFootnotes(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions)
member.summary: Adds footnote definition parsing to the supplied reader options.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderBuiltInExtensions.HasRegistration(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions,System.String)
member.summary: Returns when a named built-in extension is already registered.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions
member.summary: Options for the Markdown reader. Profiles and feature toggles shape the generic markdown core, while and control opt-in syntax such as OfficeIMO callouts, TOC placeholders, footnotes, or custom inline tokens.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new OfficeIMO-flavored reader configuration with the built-in block syntax extensions registered.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile
member.summary: Named reader profiles for common markdown compatibility targets.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile.OfficeIMO
member.summary: OfficeIMO defaults including host-oriented extensions.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile.CommonMark
member.summary: CommonMark-style core markdown without host-specific extensions.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile.GitHubFlavoredMarkdown
member.summary: GitHub Flavored Markdown-style extensions without OfficeIMO host syntax.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile.Portable
member.summary: Portable OfficeIMO subset for stricter or parity-sensitive hosts.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.CreateProfile(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MarkdownDialectProfile)
member.summary: Creates a reader configuration for the requested dialect/profile.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.CreateOfficeIMOProfile
member.summary: Creates the explicit OfficeIMO profile. This mirrors the library defaults and keeps host-oriented extensions such as callouts, TOC placeholders, and footnotes enabled.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.CreateCommonMarkProfile
member.summary: Creates a CommonMark-style core profile. This disables OfficeIMO-only and GFM-style extensions such as front matter, task lists, tables, definition lists, TOC placeholders, and footnotes.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.CreateGitHubFlavoredMarkdownProfile
member.summary: Creates a GitHub Flavored Markdown-style profile. This keeps CommonMark core behavior plus tables, task lists, and footnotes, while disabling OfficeIMO-only callouts and TOC placeholders.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.CreatePortableProfile
member.summary: Creates a reader configuration for portable Markdown behavior across stricter hosts. Bare http(s)://..., www.*, and plain email tokens remain literal text, and OfficeIMO-specific extensions such as Docs-style callouts, TOC placeholders, and footnotes are disabled. Explicit Markdown links, angle-bracket autolinks, and plain unordered lists continue to work.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.FrontMatter
member.summary: Enable YAML front matter parsing at the very top of the file.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Callouts
member.summary: Enable recognition of Docs-style callouts ("> [!KIND] Title" blocks).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Headings
member.summary: Enable ATX headings (#, ##, ...).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.FencedCode
member.summary: Enable fenced code blocks (```lang ... ```), including caption on the following _line_ if present.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.IndentedCodeBlocks
member.summary: Enable indented code blocks (lines indented by 4 spaces).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Images
member.summary: Enable images (standalone lines) with optional caption on the next _italic_ line.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.StandaloneImageBlocks
member.summary: When true, a line containing only markdown image syntax (optionally with a following caption line) is promoted into a typed instead of remaining a paragraph with inline image content. Default: true for OfficeIMO-oriented parsing.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.UnorderedLists
member.summary: Enable unordered lists and task lists.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.TaskLists
member.summary: Enable task list checkbox parsing inside unordered and ordered list items.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.OrderedLists
member.summary: Enable ordered (numbered) lists.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.StrictListIndentation
member.summary: When true, nested list levels are derived from continuation-indent rules instead of the library's more permissive legacy indentation heuristic. Enabled by stricter compatibility profiles.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Tables
member.summary: Enable pipe tables with optional header + alignment row.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.DefinitionLists
member.summary: Enable definition lists (Term: Definition lines).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.TocPlaceholders
member.summary: Enable placeholder TOC markers such as [TOC] and {:toc}.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Footnotes
member.summary: Enable footnote references and footnote definition blocks.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.SingleTildeStrikethrough
member.summary: When true, GitHub Flavored Markdown-style single-tilde strikethrough (~text~) is enabled. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.PreferNarrativeSingleLineDefinitions
member.summary: When true, isolated single-line Term: Definition patterns stay as narrative paragraphs. Consecutive definition-like lines still parse as a definition list.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.HtmlBlocks
member.summary: Enable raw HTML blocks. When set to false, block-level HTML is preserved as plain text so that readers can postprocess or render it verbatim.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.Paragraphs
member.summary: Enable paragraph parsing and basic inlines.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AutolinkUrls
member.summary: When true, auto-detects plain http(s)://... URLs in text and turns them into links. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AutolinkWwwUrls
member.summary: When true, auto-detects plain www.example.com URLs in text and turns them into links. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AutolinkWwwScheme
member.summary: Scheme prefix to use for (for example https://). Default: https://.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AutolinkEmails
member.summary: When true, auto-detects plain emails in text (for example user@example.com) and turns them into mailto: links. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.BackslashHardBreaks
member.summary: When true, a trailing backslash at the end of a paragraph line is treated as a hard line break (like GitHub/CommonMark). This is in addition to the "two trailing spaces" hard break form. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.InlineHtml
member.summary:
Enable inline HTML interpretations (e.g.
, ...). When disabled, HTML tags remain literal text and no HTML decoding is performed.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.BaseUri
member.summary: Optional base URI used to resolve relative links/images. When set, relative URLs (not starting with http/https,//,#,mailto:,data:) are converted to absolute using this base during parsing.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.DisallowScriptUrls
member.summary: When true, blocks scriptable URL schemes (e.g. javascript:, vbscript:) during parsing. If a link/image uses a blocked scheme, it is treated as plain text instead of producing a clickable/linkable node. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.DisallowFileUrls
member.summary: When true, blocks file: URLs (and Windows drive-like C:\ paths) during parsing. Default: false to preserve legacy behavior for local/offline documents.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AllowMailtoUrls
member.summary: When false, mailto: links are treated as plain text. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AllowDataUrls
member.summary: When false, data: URLs are treated as plain text. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AllowProtocolRelativeUrls
member.summary: When false, protocol-relative URLs (//example.com) are treated as plain text. Default: true.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.RestrictUrlSchemes
member.summary: When true, only URL schemes listed in are allowed. Relative URLs and fragments are still allowed. Default: false to preserve legacy behavior.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.AllowedUrlSchemes
member.summary: List of allowed URL schemes when is enabled. Values are compared case-insensitively and should not include the trailing colon. Default: http, https, mailto.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.InputNormalization
member.summary: Optional markdown input normalization before parsing. Defaults are conservative (no transformations).

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.MaxInputCharacters
member.summary: Optional maximum input length, in characters, accepted by . When set and exceeded, parsing fails fast with an .

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.FencedBlockExtensions
member.summary: Optional language-based fenced block factories that can produce specialized AST nodes instead of plain instances. Later registrations win when languages overlap.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.BlockParserExtensions
member.summary: Optional block parser extensions layered into the default reader pipeline at named placement anchors. Profiles use this to opt into OfficeIMO/GFM-style non-core block syntax such as callouts, TOC placeholders, and footnotes.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.InlineParserExtensions
member.summary: Optional ordered inline parser extensions that get a chance to recognize custom inline tokens before the built-in inline parser handles the current position.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderOptions.DocumentTransforms
member.summary: Optional ordered post-parse document transforms. Use these for AST-level upgrades and host-specific semantic rewrites after markdown has been parsed.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderState
member.summary: Mutable per-parse state shared across block and inline parsers.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownReaderState.LinkRefs
member.summary: Reference-style link definitions collected while parsing.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IMarkdownDocumentTransform
member.summary: Post-parse document transform applied to a typed .

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.IMarkdownDocumentTransform.Transform(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDoc,OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDocumentTransformContext)
member.summary: Applies the transform to the supplied markdown document. Implementations may mutate in place or return a replacement instance.
member.returns: The transformed document.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownColonListBoundaryTransform
member.summary: Splits paragraph content when a prose label ending with a colon was emitted directly before a list marker.
member.remarks: This transform is intended for recoverable paragraph-level cleanup where markdown already parsed into a paragraph block, but the paragraph text still contains an inline list marker that should start a new list item. The split is performed directly on the parsed inline AST rather than by reparsing rendered markdown.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownCompactHeadingBoundaryTransform
member.summary: Splits paragraph content when a compact ATX heading marker was emitted directly after prose on the same line.
member.remarks: This transform is intended for recoverable paragraph-level transcript/document cleanup where markdown already parsed into a paragraph block, but the paragraph text still contains an inline ##-to-###### marker that should begin a new heading. The split is performed directly on the parsed inline AST rather than by round-tripping markdown text back through the reader.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownCompactStrongLabelListBoundaryTransform
member.summary: Splits compact unordered strong-label list boundaries that were emitted inline after punctuation or symbols.
member.remarks: This transform is intended for recoverable cleanup where markdown already parsed into a paragraph block or a simple unordered list item, but the content still contains an inline list marker that should begin a new list item. The split is performed directly on the parsed inline AST rather than by reparsing markdown text.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDocumentTransformPipeline
member.summary: Applies ordered post-parse transforms to typed markdown documents.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDocumentTransformPipeline.Apply(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDoc,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{OfficeIMO.Markdown.IMarkdownDocumentTransform},OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownDocumentTransformContext)
member.summary: Applies the supplied transforms in order.
member.returns: The final transformed document.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownHeadingListBoundaryTransform
member.summary: Splits heading content when an unordered strong-label list marker was emitted directly after the heading text.
member.remarks: This transform is intended for recoverable heading-level cleanup where markdown already parsed into a heading block, but the heading text still contains an inline list marker that should begin a new unordered list item. The split is performed directly on the parsed inline AST rather than by round-tripping the heading back through markdown parsing.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInlineNormalizationTransform
member.summary: Applies AST-safe inline normalization to an existing .
member.remarks: Use this when markdown or HTML has already been parsed into a document and you want to apply inline-safe cleanup such as escaped code-span repair, tight strong-boundary spacing, tight colon spacing, or tight parenthetical spacing without going back through the text pre-parse path.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInlineNormalizationTransform.#ctor(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions)
member.summary: Creates a document transform that applies AST-safe inline normalization.
member.param: Inline normalization options. Only AST-safe options take effect.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInlineNormalizationTransform.Options
member.summary: Inline normalization options used by the transform.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownIntelligenceXCachedToolEvidenceMarkerTransform
member.summary: Removes cached-evidence transport marker paragraphs emitted in IntelligenceX transcript flows.
member.remarks: This intentionally runs as a document transform because the marker is already parseable markdown and should be removed structurally rather than through pre-parse text surgery.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownIntelligenceXLegacyToolHeadingTransform
member.summary: Promotes parseable legacy IntelligenceX tool-heading artifacts into real heading blocks.
member.remarks: This transform intentionally targets only cases where the markdown already parsed into a recoverable AST, so transcript compatibility can move away from text rewriting and toward structural upgrades.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownJsonVisualCodeBlockTransform
member.summary: Upgrades known visual fenced code blocks and legacy JSON visual payloads into first-class semantic fenced blocks.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownJsonVisualCodeBlockTransform.#ctor(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownVisualFenceLanguageMode)
member.summary: Creates a visual-code-block transform.
member.param: Fence-language strategy for upgraded JSON payloads.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownJsonVisualCodeBlockTransform.LanguageMode
member.summary: Fence-language strategy for upgraded JSON payloads.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownVisualFenceLanguageMode
member.summary: Fence-language strategy for visual code-block upgrades.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownVisualFenceLanguageMode.PreserveOriginal
member.summary: Keep the original fence language (typically json).

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownVisualFenceLanguageMode.GenericSemanticFence
member.summary: Rewrite upgraded payloads to neutral semantic fence languages such as chart.

member.name: F:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownVisualFenceLanguageMode.IntelligenceXAliasFence
member.summary: Rewrite upgraded payloads to IntelligenceX alias fences such as ix-chart.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownListParagraphStrongArtifactTransform
member.summary: Repairs malformed strong-marker artifacts inside already-parsed list-item paragraphs.
member.remarks: This transform is intended for recoverable list-item inline artifacts that do not require block-boundary repair. It operates directly on the inline AST and only repairs node patterns that the reader already recovered into list-item paragraph content.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownListParagraphStrongArtifactTransform.#ctor(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions)
member.summary: Creates a transform with the specified normalization options.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownListParagraphStrongArtifactTransform.Options
member.summary: Normalization switches used by this transform.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownRegisteredFencedBlockTransform
member.summary: Reapplies registered fenced-block factories to parsed fenced nodes throughout the document tree, so nested hosts and fragment parsers converge on the same typed AST.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownRegisteredFencedBlockTransform.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownFencedBlockExtension})
member.summary: Creates a transform that upgrades matching fenced nodes using the supplied registered fenced-block extensions.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownSimpleDefinitionListParagraphTransform
member.summary: Expands simple parsed definition-list entries into ordinary paragraphs.
member.remarks: Use this for compatibility-oriented hosts that prefer narrative paragraph output over grouped definition-list rendering, while still preserving complex definition-list entries. Entries are converted only when the term is non-empty and the definition body is a single paragraph.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownStandaloneHashHeadingSeparatorTransform
member.summary: Removes empty standalone # separator headings that appear immediately before real headings.
member.remarks: This is intended for compatibility-oriented transcript/document cleanup where a model emitted a stray single-hash line before the actual heading content. Ordinary empty headings that are not directly followed by another heading are preserved.

member.summary: Applies to while temporarily replacing inline-code spans and unmatched inline-code tails with unique placeholders.
member.param: Transformation to apply to the protected text.
member.returns: The transformed text with original inline-code spans restored.

member.name: T:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions
member.summary: Options for lightweight markdown text normalization before parsing.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeZeroWidthSpacingArtifacts
member.summary: When true, removes zero-width spacing artifacts such as U+200B/U+2060/U+FEFF that can break markdown readability. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeEmojiWordJoins
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing space between common status/emoji markers and following prose (for example, ✅Healthy becomes ✅ Healthy). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCompactNumberedChoiceBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts missing spacing around compact numbered-choice joins (for example, or2) becomes or 2)). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeSentenceCollapsedBullets
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline before compact bullet markers emitted directly after sentence punctuation (for example, Done.- **Next:** check becomes Done.\n- **Next:** check). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeSoftWrappedStrongSpans
member.summary: When true, joins short hard-wrapped bold labels (for example, "**Status\nOK**") into a single bold span. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeInlineCodeSpanLineBreaks
member.summary: When true, compacts inline code spans containing line breaks into a single line. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeEscapedInlineCodeSpans
member.summary: When true, converts escaped inline code spans (for example, \`code\`) into standard markdown code spans. This helps chat/model outputs that over-escape backticks. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeTightStrongBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing space after a closing strong span when followed by a word character (for example, **Healthy**next becomes **Healthy** next). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeTightArrowStrongBoundaries
member.summary: When true, normalizes compact arrow-to-strong boundaries (for example, ->**Why it matters:** becomes -> **Why it matters:**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeBrokenStrongArrowLabels
member.summary: When true, repairs malformed strong spans that are missing the closing delimiter immediately before an arrow-led strong label (for example, **No current failures -> **Why it matters:** becomes **No current failures** -> **Why it matters:**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeWrappedSignalFlowStrongRuns
member.summary: When true, repairs malformed signal-flow bullets where an entire arrow chain was accidentally wrapped in one strong span. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeSignalFlowLabelSpacing
member.summary: When true, inserts missing spaces after signal-flow labels inside arrow segments (for example, -> **Why it matters:**coverage becomes -> **Why it matters:** coverage, and -> Why it matters:coverage becomes -> Why it matters: coverage). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCollapsedMetricChains
member.summary: When true, expands collapsed transcript-style metric chains into real markdown lines and converts legacy bold metric labels into plain labels with bold values. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeHostLabelBulletArtifacts
member.summary: When true, repairs compact host-label bullets and merges plain continuation lines (for example, -AD1 followed by healthy becomes - AD1 healthy). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeTightColonSpacing
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing space after a colon in prose labels (for example, Why it matters:missing coverage becomes Why it matters: missing coverage). This is applied by AST-level inline normalization and intentionally skips inline code spans. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeHeadingListBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline between an ATX heading and an immediately-following unordered strong-label list marker on the same line (for example, ## Summary- **Item:** value becomes ## Summary\n- **Item:** value). prefers to apply this via a document transform after parse when the markdown already parsed into a recoverable heading block. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCompactStrongLabelListBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline before compact unordered strong-label list markers that were emitted inline after punctuation or symbol characters (for example, ✅- **FSMO:** ok becomes ✅\n- **FSMO:** ok). prefers to apply this via a document transform after parse when the markdown already parsed into a recoverable paragraph or simple unordered list-item structure. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCompactHeadingBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline before compact ATX headings emitted directly after prose or symbols on the same line (for example, unexpected### Reason becomes unexpected\n### Reason). prefers to apply this via a document transform after parse when the markdown already parsed into a recoverable paragraph block. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeStandaloneHashHeadingSeparators
member.summary: When true, removes stray standalone # separator lines that appear immediately before a real ATX heading. prefers to apply this via a document transform after parse so hosts can keep the repair in the AST pipeline when the markdown already parses cleanly. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeBrokenTwoLineStrongLeadIns
member.summary: When true, repairs broken two-line strong lead-ins such as **Result followed by body text** tail. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeColonListBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline between a colon and an immediately-following unordered list marker on the same line (for example, Next step:- **Item** becomes Next step:\n- **Item**). prefers to apply this via a document transform after parse when the markdown already parsed into a recoverable paragraph block. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCompactFenceBodyBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing newline between a fenced code block language token and inline body content for common compact model-output mistakes (for example, ```json{"x":1} becomes ```json\n{"x":1}, and ```mermaidflowchart LR A-->B becomes ```mermaid\nflowchart LR A-->B). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeLooseStrongDelimiters
member.summary: When true, trims accidental whitespace immediately inside strong delimiters (for example, ** Healthy** or **Healthy ** become **Healthy**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeOrderedListMarkerSpacing
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing space after an ordered list marker when the content starts with emphasis-like characters (for example, 2.**Task** becomes 2. **Task**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeOrderedListParenMarkers
member.summary: When true, converts ordered list markers in 1) form to 1. with normalized spacing. Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeOrderedListCaretArtifacts
member.summary: When true, removes stray caret artifacts after ordered list markers (for example, 2.^ **Task** becomes 2. **Task**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeCollapsedOrderedListBoundaries
member.summary: When true, inserts missing newlines between adjacent ordered list items that were emitted on one line (for example, ...)2.**Task** becomes ...)\n2.**Task**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeOrderedListStrongDetailClosures
member.summary: When true, repairs malformed ordered list items where a bold title is missing its closing strong delimiter before a parenthetical detail section (for example, 1. **Task(detail) becomes 1. **Task** (detail)). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeTightParentheticalSpacing
member.summary: When true, inserts a missing space before parenthetical phrases adjacent to prose or strong spans (for example, **Task**(detail) becomes **Task** (detail)). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeNestedStrongDelimiters
member.summary: When true, flattens malformed nested strong delimiters emitted by some model outputs (for example, **from **Service Control Manager**.**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeDanglingTrailingStrongListClosers
member.summary: When true, upgrades trailing list-item strong-close artifacts (for example, - Overall health Healthy**** becomes - Overall health **Healthy**). Default: false.

member.name: P:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.NormalizeMetricValueStrongRuns
member.summary: When true, repairs malformed strong runs used as metric values (for example, ******healthy**, **✅****Healthy**, or a missing trailing closer). Default: false.

member.name: M:OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationOptions.ApplyPreset(OfficeIMO.Markdown.MarkdownInputNormalizationPreset)
member.summary: Enables the named preset on the current options instance. Existing values are overwritten by the preset defaults.
member.returns: The same options instance for chaining.
